name: Butter Pecan Crunch
recipeIngredient: 1 Quart Butter pecan ice cream, soft
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs and butter in a bowl. Press into the bottom of an ungreased 13x9x2-inch pan.
2. Chill.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat together the instant pudding mix and milk until well blended, about 1 minute.
4. Fold in the softened butter pecan ice cream and thawed whipped topping.
5. Sprinkle crushed Heath candy bars evenly over the top of the mixture.
